current_files..github/workflows/drufiy-ci.yml:
name: drufiy-ci
on: [push, pull_request]
jobs:
  typecheck:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 20
          cache: npm
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci
      - name: TypeScript type check
        run: npx tsc --noEmit --skipLibCheck

expected.problem_summary: setup-node fails because lock file missing; repo is static HTML/CSS/JS with no package.json

notes: Live prod case — Prash diagnosed workflow_config, created PR, CI passed, user merged. Workflow had npm steps on a pure static HTML site.
